channel.title: Amazon Digital Purchases on Insights.HighDeals
channel.description: Recent content in Amazon Digital Purchases on Insights.HighDeals

item.title: Amazon Digital Purchases Explained: Apps, Movies, Subscriptions
item.description: Amazon sells far more than physical products. From apps and films to subscriptions and in-game content, digital purchases follow their own pricing rules. This long-form guide explains how they work, when real discounts appear, and how experienced deal hunters evaluate digital deals.
